title: Microsoft Wants Sales Team to Push Its Own AI Models Instead of Rivals OpenAI, Google and Anthropic: Report (UPDATED)
excerpt: Microsoft Corp. has reportedly instructed its sales team on Tuesday to position in-house AI models above rival offerings from OpenAI, Alphabet’s Google and A...
content_html:
Benzinga and Yahoo Finance LLC may earn commission or revenue on some items through the links below.

Microsoft Corp. has reportedly instructed its sales team on Tuesday to position in-house AI models above rival offerings from OpenAI, Alphabet's Google and Anthropic, as part of a fiscal 2027 strategy session.

Executive Vice President Jay Parikh told staff, "Everyone else is selling parts — we're selling the full end-to-end system," according to a Bloomberg report on Wednesday.

Copilot vs. Claude Comparison Raises Eyebrows

According to the report, Copilot chief Jacob Andreou compared Copilot with Anthropic's Claude, saying it was slower, less accurate and did not have strong security integrations across Microsoft's Office apps.

Microsoft declined to comment on this story.

Don't Miss:

  • A single bad hire can set a startup back years. Here are the 5 hires founders most often misjudge — and why

  • Still Learning the Market? These 50 Must-Know Terms Can Help You Catch Up Fast

The strategy session focused on promoting Microsoft's in-house AI models as more efficient and less expensive than competing offerings. The rivals it compared itself with, OpenAI and Anthropic, have long provided the AI models used in many of Microsoft's own products.

The change comes after Microsoft ended OpenAI's exclusivity through a deal in April. It also follows a recent report that Microsoft is replacing OpenAI and Anthropic models in Word and Excel as part of an effort to reduce costs.

Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella recently said companies "pay for intelligence twice" when they rely on third-party AI, warning that using outside models can expose valuable business knowledge to external vendors.

See Also: Avoid the #1 Investing Mistake: How Your 'Safe' Holdings Could Be Costing You Big Time

Meta also signaled plans to undercut rivals, with CEO Mark Zuckerberg suggesting its new Model API could be priced roughly 25% below OpenAI and Anthropic, JPMorgan analyst Doug Anmuth said on Monday.

Trading Metrics

Microsoft has a market capitalization of $2.94 trillion, with a 52-week high of $555.45 and a 52-week low of $349.20.

Over the past 12 months, the large-cap stock has dropped 21.75%.

Photo courtesy: Shutterstock

  • Skip the Regrets: The Essential Retirement Tips Experts Wish Everyone Knew Earlier.

  • Think you're saving enough for your kids? You might be dangerously off — see why

Building Wealth Across More Than Just the Market

Building a resilient portfolio means thinking beyond a single asset or market trend. Economic cycles shift, sectors rise and fall, and no one investment performs well in every environment. That's why many investors look to diversify with platforms that provide access to real estate, fixed-income opportunities, precious metals, and even self-directed retirement accounts. By spreading exposure across multiple asset classes, it becomes easier to manage risk, capture steady returns, and create long-term wealth that isn't tied to the fortunes of just one company or industry.

blocks.html_en: Building Wealth Across More Than Just the Market

sentences.en: Building Wealth Across More Than Just the Market
sentences.zh: 不仅仅在市场上创造财富

blocks.html_en: Building a resilient portfolio means thinking beyond a single asset or market trend. Economic cycles shift, sectors rise and fall, and no one investment performs well in every environment. That's why many investors look to diversify with platforms that provide access to real estate, fixed-income opportunities, precious metals, and even self-directed retirement accounts. By spreading exposure across multiple asset classes, it becomes easier to manage risk, capture steady returns, and create long-term wealth that isn't tied to the fortunes of just one company or industry.

sentences.en: Building a resilient portfolio means thinking beyond a single asset or market trend.
sentences.zh: 建立有弹性的投资组合意味着超越单一资产或市场趋势的思维。

sentences.en: Economic cycles shift, sectors rise and fall, and no one investment performs well in every environment.
sentences.zh: 经济周期发生变化，行业兴衰，没有一项投资在所有环境下都能表现良好。

sentences.en: That's why many investors look to diversify with platforms that provide access to real estate, fixed-income opportunities, precious metals, and even self-directed retirement accounts.
sentences.zh: 这就是为什么许多投资者希望通过提供房地产、固定收益机会、贵金属甚至自我管理退休账户的平台来实现多元化。

sentences.en: By spreading exposure across multiple asset classes, it becomes easier to manage risk, capture steady returns, and create long-term wealth that isn't tied to the fortunes of just one company or industry.
sentences.zh: 通过将风险分散到多个资产类别，可以更轻松地管理风险、获得稳定的回报并创造不只与一家公司或行业的命运挂钩的长期财富。

content_html_zh:
Benzinga 和 Yahoo Finance LLC 可能通过以下链接赚取某些项目的佣金或收入。

据报道，作为 2027 财年战略会议的一部分，微软公司周二指示其销售团队将内部人工智能模型定位于 OpenAI、Alphabet 旗下谷歌和 Anthropic 的竞争对手产品之上。

据彭博社周三报道，执行副总裁杰伊·帕里克 (Jay Parikh) 告诉员工，“其他人都在销售零部件，而我们正在销售完整的端到端系统”。

副驾驶与克劳德的比较令人惊讶

报道称，Copilot 负责人 Jacob Andreou 将 Copilot 与 Anthropic 的 Claude 进行了比较，称 Copilot 速度较慢、准确性较差，并且在微软 Office 应用程序中没有强大的安全集成。

微软拒绝对此事发表评论。

不要错过：

  • 一次糟糕的招聘可能会让一家初创企业倒退数年。 以下是创始人最常误判的 5 名员工——以及原因
  • 还在学习市场吗？ 这 50 个必须知道的术语可以帮助您快速跟上

战略会议的重点是推广微软的内部人工智能模型，使其比竞争产品更高效、更便宜。 它的竞争对手 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 长期以来一直提供微软自己的许多产品中使用的人工智能模型。

这一变化是在微软四月份通过一项交易终止 OpenAI 的独家经营权之后发生的。 最近的一份报告称，微软正在替换 Word 和 Excel 中的 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 模型，作为降低成本的一部分。

微软首席执行官萨蒂亚·纳德拉 (Satya Nadella) 最近表示，当公司依赖第三方人工智能时，他们“为情报付出了两次代价”，并警告说，使用外部模型可能会将宝贵的业务知识暴露给外部供应商。

另请参阅：避免第一大投资错误：您的“安全”资产可能会花费您大量时间

摩根大通分析师道格·安穆斯 (Doug Anmuth) 周一表示，Meta 还表示计划削弱竞争对手，首席执行官马克·扎克伯格 (Mark Zuckerberg) 表示，其新 Model API 的定价可能比 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 低约 25%。

交易指标

微软市值为2.94万亿美元，52周高点为555.45美元，52周低点为349.20美元。

过去12个月，大盘股下跌21.75%。

照片提供：Shutterstock

  • 跳过遗憾：专家希望每个人都早点知道基本的退休技巧。
  • 您认为您为孩子存的钱足够了吗？ 你可能会陷入危险——看看为什么

不仅仅在市场上创造财富

建立有弹性的投资组合意味着超越单一资产或市场趋势的思维。 经济周期发生变化，行业兴衰，没有一项投资在所有环境下都能表现良好。 这就是为什么许多投资者希望通过提供房地产、固定收益机会、贵金属甚至自我管理退休账户的平台来实现多元化。 通过将风险分散到多个资产类别，可以更轻松地管理风险、获得稳定的回报并创造不只与一家公司或行业的命运挂钩的长期财富。
